trait.name: Metal Shell
trait.effect: If you don't attack during your turn, you gain a shell of metal surrounding you. The next time you would take 5 or more damage from an ability, reduce it to 1, then create a height 1 metal shell object in a free adjacent space.

basicAttack.name: Magi
basicAttack.effect:
Attack: 2 damage. Hit: +1d6
Area effect: 2 damage
Effect a difficult (5+) dangerous terrain space in the center space, even if it's occupied.

limitBreak.name: Wrecking Ball
limitBreak.effect:
You surround yourself in screeching layers of metal, forming an invincible, bladed shell and becoming a blunt instrument.
Effect yourself from the battlefield, then replace yourself with a height 1 wrecking ball object.
Effect, push the object 3 in a straight line in any direction. The object can also be pushed by allies as though it were a character, or an ally can push it using the interact (1 action) ability to push it 3 spaces.
• If the wrecking ball enters the space of a character, they take 2d3 piercing damage, are pushed 2d3, and gain slow. A character can suffer these effects once a turn but any number of time a round.
• If the wrecking ball enters the space of another object, remove it.
Effect the start of your next turn, remove the object and replace it with you.

keywords.name: Heavy
keywords.description: Use a heavier version of an ability. If you do, you are unable to attack or use a heavy ability until the end of your next turn.
